docs.title: Next.js SaaS Starter Kit & Templates – Vercel

repo.title: GitHub - nextjs/saas-starter: Get started quickly with Next.js, Postgres, Stripe, and shadcn/ui. · GitHub

manifest_entry.name: Next.js SaaS Starter
teaches: how a serious SaaS starter organizes public and authenticated surfaces
billing, auth, and product shell boundaries
good default route structure for a real software business
how to begin with production-oriented scaffolding instead of toy structure
avoid: assuming starter business logic equals your product strategy
keeping generic SaaS copy or layout choices after the initial setup
manifest_entry.why_this_matters: Useful when a project needs a real SaaS foundation instead of an isolated page or demo.
manifest_entry.reusable_lesson: A good SaaS starter reduces setup drag, but the product still needs its own point of view.
